untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition (AADB - Ascending/Ascending Double Bottom) which cannot be expressed using only price, moving averages, and technical indicators. Specific pattern detection logic for identifying two distinct bottom prices, comparing their relative heights and widths, and assessing the relationship between right and left bottoms requires candlestick pattern recognition not available in the indicator set. Market regime-specific performance thresholds (39% success in bull/right-bottom-lower condition, 29% in alternative condition) also cannot be encoded as executable entry/exit rules.
translation_notes: This is a chart pattern signal that requires visual/structural pattern detection. The entry conditions depend on identifying two specific bottom formations and comparing their price levels and dimensions—logic that cannot be captured with the allowed indicators. A proper implementation would require a pattern recognition module or explicit swing point detection (not available). Suggested alternative: implement as a separate pattern scanner that identifies AADB formations and feeds signals to this rule engine.
